title: Atomically switch the scaffold and update breakdown
description:
In one slice, flip the scaffold and update breakdown **together**, so no intermediate state has `apply plan`'s graph incompatible with breakdown: make `jit apply plan` the scaffold (producing C→B→P), refactor breakdown to consume the pre-created breakdown node (locate B, then the approved planning node through it, preserving the plan-review precondition), and remove the old scaffold command and its create-time flag.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] SCFB-01: after this task `jit apply plan <container>` is the scaffold and breakdown consumes the pre-created B against the C→B→P shape.
- [ ] [hard] SCFB-02: the old command and flag are removed and the bracket workflow is green before and after — no broken intermediate.
